column4: Verify debit notes are auto-created when deductions are added
column6: PO exists with payable created in Zoho
column7:
1. Navigate to PO deduction section
 2. Add deduction for quality issue (₹5000)
 3. Add deduction for shortage (₹3000)
 4. Verify debit notes are created in Zoho with following values:
  - Debit note #
  - Supplier business name
  - Supplier GST #
  - Supplier Billing Address
  - Source of Supply
  - Destination of Supply
  - PO #
  - Date of Debit note
  - Type of deduction
  - If Quality deduction (then note added by the SA)
  - Amount of deduction
  - Digital signatures
 5. Check debit note PDF is generated
 6. Verify digital signature is applied
 7. Verify debit note is visible as attachment next to deduction
 8. Confirm notifications are sent
column8: Debit notes are automatically created in Zoho with all required values including supplier details, addresses, deduction type, and digital signatures
column9: Deduction Amounts: Quality ₹5000, Shortage ₹3000, PO: PO12345, Supplier: ABC Traders, GST: 29ABCDE1234F1Z5

column4: Verify backfill requirements as specified in PRD

 4. Verify old POs continue with manual Zoho updates
 5. Confirm backfill exclusions are properly documented
 6. Test edge cases for pre-release POs
 7. Verify no automatic sync for historical data
 8. Confirm manual process for old POs
 9. Validate backfill policy implementation
